code: import axios from"axios";import{getToken}from"../utils/auth";const api=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL||"http://localhost:5000/api"});api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=getToken();if(token){config.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${token}`;}return config;});export const authService={register:payload=>api.post("/auth/register",payload),login:payload=>api.post("/auth/login",payload)};export const bookService={getAll:()=>api.get("/books"),create:payload=>api.post("/books",payload),update:(id,payload)=>api.put(`/books/${id}`,payload),remove:id=>api.delete(`/books/${id}`)};export const userService={getAll:()=>api.get("/users"),create:payload=>api.post("/users",payload)};export const issueService={issue:payload=>api.post("/issue",payload),returnBook:payload=>api.post("/return",payload)};export default api;
